semantic.role: Defines naming conventions to ensure codebase consistency across a large monorepo.
responsibilities: Specifying naming rules for interfaces in type definition files
Specifying naming rules for test file suffixes
outOfScope: General coding style or formatting rules

English.purpose: This document establishes mandatory naming conventions for the ArchSpine project to maintain a uniform and predictable codebase, especially within a large monorepo environment.
English.context_and_audience: Intended for all developers contributing to the ArchSpine monorepo, particularly those working on type definitions and test files. It serves as a quick reference to enforce consistency and avoid ambiguity.
key_takeaways: All internal interfaces in src/types/**/*.ts must be prefixed with 'I' (e.g., IUserRepository).
All test files under tests/ must end with .test.ts or .spec.ts.
Violations of interface naming are warnings; test file naming violations are errors.

Simplified Chinese.purpose: 本文档为 ArchSpine 项目制定了强制性的命名规范，以确保在大型 monorepo 中代码库风格统一且可预测。
Simplified Chinese.context_and_audience: 适用于所有为 ArchSpine monorepo 贡献代码的开发者，特别是处理类型定义和测试文件的开发者。本文档作为快速参考，帮助强制执行一致性并避免歧义。
key_takeaways: src/types/**/*.ts 中的所有内部接口必须以 'I' 开头（例如 IUserRepository）。
tests/ 下的所有测试文件必须以 .test.ts 或 .spec.ts 结尾。
接口命名违规为警告；测试文件命名违规为错误。
